faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Common questions about local SEO, Google Business Profile optimization, and local rankings.

items.question: What is local SEO?
items.answer: Local SEO helps your business appear for location-based searches, Google Maps results, and nearby customer queries.

items.question: Do you optimize Google Business Profile?
items.answer: Yes. We optimize categories, services, descriptions, photos, posts, citations, reviews, and local ranking signals.

items.question: How long does local SEO take?
items.answer: Most businesses start seeing improvements within 2-4 months, depending on competition, current profile health, and location.

items.question: Can local SEO generate leads?
items.answer: Yes. Better local visibility can increase calls, direction requests, website visits, and qualified enquiries from nearby customers.
